creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
Thanks for replying on a weekend.
I am the official ports maintainer for the p5-Mail-SpamAssassin port,
and was doing regression testing on new updates.
(SA uses p5-IO-Zlib).  With the new 'stuff', it doesn't run anymore, and
I tracked it down to amavisd-new, which calls SA, which stops and
complains that it can't find all the dependencies.

Maybe not the real issue, might have to look further.
Last time this happened I needed to backup IO-Zlib until the * stuff was
updated.

What logs?

If I cd /usr/ports/archivers/p5-IO-Zlib and do a make I get:

 make
=3D=3D=3D>  Extracting for p5-IO-Zlib-1.07
=3D> MD5 Checksum OK for IO-Zlib-1.07.tar.gz.
=3D> SHA256 Checksum OK for IO-Zlib-1.07.tar.gz.
=3D=3D=3D>   p5-IO-Zlib-1.07 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8 - =
found
=3D=3D=3D>  Patching for p5-IO-Zlib-1.07
=3D=3D=3D>   p5-IO-Zlib-1.07 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8 - =
found
=3D=3D=3D>  Applying FreeBSD patches for p5-IO-Zlib-1.07
=3D=3D=3D>   p5-IO-Zlib-1.07 depends on file:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Compress/Zlib.pm - found
=3D=3D=3D>   p5-IO-Zlib-1.07 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8 - =
found
=3D=3D=3D>   p5-IO-Zlib-1.07 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8 - =
found
=3D=3D=3D>  Configuring for p5-IO-Zlib-1.07
Checking if your kit is complete...
Looks good
Warning: prerequisite Compress::Zlib 0 not found.
Writing Makefile for IO::Zlib
=3D=3D=3D>  Building for p5-IO-Zlib-1.07
cp Zlib.pm blib/lib/IO/Zlib.pm
Manifying blib/man3/IO::Zlib.3

If I run Makefile.PL by hand:

ent-1000# cd work
ent-1000# cd IO-Zlib-1.07/
ent-1000# perl Makefile.PL
Warning: prerequisite Compress::Zlib 0 not found.
Writing Makefile for IO::Zlib

But, it looks there:

 pkg_info | grep Compress

p5-Compress-Raw-Zlib-2.006 Low-Level Interface to zlib compression
library
p5-Compress-Zlib-2.006 Perl5 interface to zlib compression library
p5-IO-Compress-Base-2.006 Base Class for IO::Uncompress modules
p5-IO-Compress-Zlib-2.006 Perl5 interface for reading and writing of
(g)zip files
p5-IO-Zlib-1.07     IO:: style interface to Compress::Zlib


I even do:

 portupgrade -f p5-IO-Compress\* p5-Compress\*

And
 portupgrade -rRf p5-IO-Zlib

Still doesn't ether find the right stuff, or drag in the right
dependencies.

So, I ASSUMED it was the same problem I had last time ;-)





--=20
Michael Scheidell, CTO
Office: 561-999-5000 x 1259
Direct: 561-939-7259
Real time security alerts: http://www.secnap.com/news
=20

> -----Original Message-----
> From: Jun Kuriyama [mailto:kuriyama@imgsrc.co.jp]=20
> Sent: Saturday, October 13, 2007 5:59 AM
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org; Michael Scheidell
> Subject: Re: ports/117147: archivers/p5-IO-Zlib 1.07 requires=20
> Compress::Zlib 2.007
>=20
>=20
>=20
> Hmm, I cannot understand your situation.  p5-IO-Zlib already=20
> has $RUN_DEPENDS on p5-Compress-Zlib.  Can you give full log=20
> of your failure?
>=20
>=20
> --=20
